seoTitle: North Lakes vs North Mackay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Lakes and North Mackay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Lakes vs North Mackay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Lakes and North Mackay.
heading: North Lakes vs North Mackay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Lakes, Queensland and North Mackay, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to North Lakes (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Lakes or North Mackay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Lakes has a flood risk score of 40/100, while North Mackay scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Lakes scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. North Mackay scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Lakes or North Mackay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Mackay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
